basic_details.job_title: DSCI Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Delhi State Cancer Institutes (DSCI), Govt. of NCT of Delhi
basic_details.post_name: Senior Consultant in Radiology Department (On Visiting Basis)
basic_details.short_information: DSCI is recruiting 01 Senior Consultant (Radiology) on a visiting/contractual basis. Candidates with MD and 13 years of teaching/research experience can apply. Last date is 14 August 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be decided and informed to eligible candidates

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 66 years as on the date of application.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Upto 66 Years | other requirements: Consent for registration under PCPNDT Act is mandatory. Police Verification / Vigilance Clearance required at joining.
qualification.education_qualification: Medical qualification included in Schedule I/II of Indian Medical Council Act + Postgraduate qualification (MD or equivalent) in Radiology
qualification.experience: 13 years teaching and/or research experience (including at least 4 years as Assistant Professor and 3 years as Associate Professor) after MD

vacancy_details.Name of Post: Senior Consultant in Radiology Deptt. (On Visiting Basis)
vacancy_details.Remuneration: Rs. 10,000/- per day (Two days a week, max. 10 days per month)

post_wise_breakdown.name_of_post: Senior Consultant in Radiology Deptt. (On Visiting Basis)
post_wise_breakdown.remuneration: Rs. 10,000/- per day (Two days a week, max. 10 days per month)

category_wise_vacancy.Name of Post: Senior Consultant in Radiology Deptt. (On Visiting Basis)

selection_process: Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications followed by Personal Interview before a duly constituted Selection Committee. Only eligible candidates will be informed about the interview date. Final selection is subject to verification of original documents.
how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application form from the DSCI website.
Fill the form completely in all respects.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents (educational certificates, experience proofs, publications, etc.).
Send the application by Post / By Hand in a sealed envelope to: Office of Director, 1st Floor, Admin Block, Delhi State Cancer Institutes (East), Dilshad Garden, Delhi-110095
important_instructions: The engagement is purely on visiting/contract basis with no claim for regular absorption. Engagement can be terminated by giving one month’s notice. Candidates must produce all original documents at the time of interview. Any false information will lead to termination of services. Disputes shall be subject to jurisdiction of Delhi/New Delhi only. Regularly visit https://dsci.delhi.gov.in for updates.

content_sections.heading: DSCI Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Delhi State Cancer Institute (DSCI) invites applications for engagement of Senior Consultant in Radiology Deptt. on visiting basis at its East (Dilshad Garden) and West (Janak Puri) setups. The engagement will be initially for a period of one year, extendable subject to satisfactory performance or till the regular post of Professor in Radiology/Onco-imaging is filled. Applications must reach the Office of Director, DSCI East by 14.08.2026 (05:00 PM). Download DSCI Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DSCI Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: DSCI is recruiting 01 Senior Consultant (Radiology) on a visiting/contractual basis. Candidates with MD and 13 years of teaching/research experience can apply. Last date is 14 August 2026.

rows.name_of_post: Senior Consultant in Radiology Deptt. (On Visiting Basis)
rows.remuneration: Rs. 10,000/- per day (Two days a week, max. 10 days per month)

content_sections.heading: DSCI Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Medical qualification included in Schedule I/II of Indian Medical Council Act + Postgraduate qualification (MD or equivalent) in Radiology
13 years teaching and/or research experience (including at least 4 years as Assistant Professor and 3 years as Associate Professor) after MD
Consent for registration under PCPNDT Act is mandatory. Police Verification / Vigilance Clearance required at joining.

content_sections.heading: DSCI Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit is 66 years as on the date of application.

content_sections.heading: DSCI Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications followed by Personal Interview before a duly constituted Selection Committee. Only eligible candidates will be informed about the interview date. Final selection is subject to verification of original documents.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for DSCI Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed application form from the DSCI website. Fill the form completely in all respects. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents (educational certificates, experience proofs, publications, etc.). Send the application by Post / By Hand in a sealed envelope to: Office of Director, 1st Floor, Admin Block, Delhi State Cancer Institutes (East), Dilshad Garden, Delhi-110095 Last date: 14 August 2026 by 05:00 PM.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for DSCI Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The engagement is purely on visiting/contract basis with no claim for regular absorption. Engagement can be terminated by giving one month’s notice. Candidates must produce all original documents at the time of interview. Any false information will lead to termination of services. Disputes shall be subject to jurisdiction of Delhi/New Delhi only. Regularly visit https://dsci.delhi.gov.in for updates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DSCI Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving the application is 14 August 2026 by 05:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there for Senior Consultant in Radiology at Delhi State Cancer Institutes?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Senior Consultant in Radiology on visiting basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the remuneration for Senior Consultant at DSCI?
faq.answer: Remuneration is Rs. 10,000/- per day (maximum 10 days per month).

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for DSCI Senior Consultant Radiology post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 66 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the essential qualification for DSCI Senior Consultant 2026?
faq.answer: MD in Radiology or equivalent + 13 years teaching/research experience (with minimum 4 years as Assistant Professor and 3 years as Associate Professor).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for Delhi State Cancer Institutes Senior Consultant vacancy?
faq.answer: Fill the prescribed application form and send it by Post/By Hand to the Director’s Office at DSCI East, Dilshad Garden, Delhi by 14.08.2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is the DSCI Senior Consultant post permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: It is a visiting/contractual engagement on temporary basis, initially for one year.

faq.question: Q8. Will there be a written test for DSCI Radiology Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: No written test. Selection is based on scrutiny and Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for DSCI Senior Consultant application?
faq.answer: Educational certificates, experience proofs, publications, medical council registration, and other relevant documents (self-attested copies).

faq.question: Q10. Where will the selected Senior Consultant be posted in DSCI?
faq.answer: The staff can be posted at any setup of DSCI – East (Dilshad Garden) or West (Janak Puri).
